title: BU Career Fair — Spring 2026
description: Annual spring career fair featuring 80+ employers across tech, finance, consulting, and healthcare. Bring printed resumes and dress professionally.

title: AI & Machine Learning Research Symposium
description: Faculty and PhD students present ongoing AI and ML research. Great for undergrads looking to get into research or understand the field.

title: BU Spark! Demo Day
description: Student startups from BU Spark accelerator present their products to investors and the BU community. Free food and networking after.

title: International Student Cultural Night
description: Annual celebration featuring performances, food, and displays from BU's international student communities. Open to all.

title: Hackathon: Build for BU
description: 24-hour hackathon focused on solving real campus problems. Form teams of 2–4. Prizes sponsored by BU Spark and local tech companies.

title: Resume Workshop — Tech & Engineering
description: Small-group workshop with BU Career Development advisors focused on resumes for software engineering and tech roles.

title: CPT/OPT Info Session for F-1 Students
description: ISSO advisors walk through Curricular Practical Training and Optional Practical Training requirements, timelines, and application steps.

title: Grad School Panel: Applying to PhD Programs
description: Current PhD students and faculty discuss the application process, statements of purpose, and what grad school is really like.

title: Mental Health & Wellness Fair
description: Explore campus wellness resources, talk to counselors, and pick up stress-relief tools. Free therapy dog sessions from 1–3pm.

title: Entrepreneurship Speaker Series: Founders in Residence
description: BU alum founder shares the journey of building a venture-backed startup. Q&A session after the talk.
location: Questrom, Rafik B. Hariri Building Room 101

title: Data Science Club — Weekly Meetup
description: Weekly informal meetup for students interested in data science and machine learning. Project showcases, paper discussions, and beginner workshops.

title: BU Night Market
description: Student-run pop-up market on Nickerson Field. Food trucks, student vendors, live music. Great break from studying.
